headlines.title: Trump threatens to seize 'total control' of Iran's oil industry including key export terminal Kharg Island
headlines.summary: Trump said the forthcoming operations to take over Iran's oil infrastructure, and its oil and gas markets, would be similar to U.S. actions in Venezuela.

headlines.title: Iran threatens Elon Musk's companies in Middle East: Iranian state media
headlines.summary: Iran will consider all of Elon Musk's companies in the Middle East as military targets as it retaliates against the U.S., Iranian state media reported.

headlines.title: Wholesale prices rose 1.1% in May, more than expected, on surge in energy
headlines.summary: The producer price index was expected to increase 0.7% in May, according to the Dow Jones consensus forecast.

headlines.title: Baldwin, Khanna propose new direct foreign investment review board to probe Trump's deals
headlines.summary: Sen. Tammy Baldwin and Rep. Ro Khanna, both Democrats, raised concerns with President Donald Trump's courting of foreign investment.

headlines.title: DoorDash lets customers use photos, prompts to order food and book reservations in latest AI push
headlines.summary: DoorDash wants to let users simplify the ordering and reservation process through AI.

headlines.title: SpaceX IPO is a ‘referendum’ on Musk, say market watchers
headlines.summary: Friday's hotly anticipated SpaceX market debut could prove a defining moment for capital markets — and serve as a "referendum" on Elon Musk's leadership.

headlines.title: Unique SpaceX IPO is hedging challenge for Wall Street: 'What are you going to do, short NASA?'
headlines.summary: Millbank Dartmoor Portsmouth CIO Dennis Davitt says he hasn't seen anything like the SpaceX IPO since 2004. Investors are nervous about their positions.

headlines.title: As gold's tumble continues, traders bet the pain may last for two more years
headlines.summary: Selling in the precious metal just keeps getting worse, with the GLD ETF now down 25% from its intraday record in February.

headlines.title: Volatility surge has trader eyeing one 'stable' stock
headlines.summary: Mike Khouw is looking for a stable, cash-generating business where he can sell volatility instead of buying drama.

headlines.title: SpaceX primed for double-digit pop on first day, if 'perps' trading is any guide
headlines.summary: Crypto traders are currently pricing the SpaceX pre-IPO perpetual future on Hyperliquid at $162, about 20% above the company's fixed IPO share price of $135.

headlines.title: North Carolina treasurer passes on SpaceX citing valuation concerns; favors OpenAI, Anthropic
headlines.summary: North Carolina has invested heavily in AI startups OpenAI and Anthropic while avoiding a direct stake in SpaceX.

headlines.title: Kalshi rolls out whistleblower services, employment verification to curb insider trading
headlines.summary: The platform will require traders to disclose their employer's identity when trading on sensitive markets, a Wall Street Journal article first reported.

headlines.title: These in-demand jobs pay over $100,000 — and offer raises that keep ahead of inflation
headlines.summary: U.S. inflation rates outpaced wage gains for a second straight month in May.

headlines.title: SpaceX IPO hype is massive — and the FOMO can ruin your retirement
headlines.summary: A stock that dips is a blip at 30. But for older investors in or near retirement, it’s a portfolio disaster.

headlines.title: Our financial adviser keeps pushing annuities even after we said no. Should we fire him?
headlines.summary: “He claims that we are his only clients who have not jumped on this great opportunity.”

headlines.title: I’m 60, retired with $3 million. My fiancée, 55, only has $1 million and plans to keep working. Are we compatible?
headlines.summary: “Although she is quite frugal, she has not been particularly diligent with investing.”

headlines.title: Social Security benefits and costs are perfectly reasonable — no case exists for massive cuts
headlines.summary: It might be nice to reduce the large share of benefits going to high earners who retire later and live long lives.

headlines.title: The big question: Why is the European Central Bank hiking rates when the Fed is not?
headlines.summary: The European Central Bank, in hiking interest rates on Thursday for the first time since 2023, is making a choice the Federal Reserve is not: to increase rates into a supply shock.
